creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

Imported with changes: 
- Removed conditional LIB_DEPEND for Lesstif; we assume that people who 
have Lesstif installed will turn on HAVE_MOTIF. 
- Made myself MAINTAINER since it was "ports@freebsd.org" and this is 
sort of neat.  If you want it yourself, let me know. 
Thanks!
